box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: right; color: #C87104;

br.font: Every member of agile teams and organizations has a say. We want to give you more responsibility and freedom to plan your own work.

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: right; color: #1280B0;

br.font: Through agile's increased transparency, incremental development and clear processes, we can minimize risks and delays, and reduce workplace stress!

br.font: Extensive testing, customer feedback, documentation and translation are now integrated into our agile development processes to let us deliver the best quality product, every time.

font.br: Agile processes have built-in fast feedback cycles so we can find out and deliver what our customers need and want.
